name: Samantha | Vore | Sentient Fat
description:
WARNING: Vore, Sentient Fat

Wrong place and wrong time, is how alien abduction stories tend to go. Grainy photographs with flying saucers and tall tales are the extent of mankind's understanding of aliens, and the idea of them having visited. Then it happens to you, and the alien has an unusual goal in mind regarding you.

@Dino6435 suggested this one. A concept I've not really thought about before, as normally anthro bugs are spiders or moths. But I think the idea had merit to it, so here it is, an ant that wants to vore you!

Contains: Bug anthro, vore, sentient fat, alien abduction,

Icons are AI generated.
creator: Kenry542
